src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/Admi.after:
/**
   * Updates the music database: finds new files, removes deleted files, updates modified files.
   *
   * @return a positive number identifying the update job. You can read the current job id in the *
   *     {@link org.bff.javampd.server.Status} response.
   */
  int updateDatabase();

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/Admi.general_idea: Change return type of updateDatabase() from void to int to support job tracking.
Update Javadoc for updateDatabase(String) to reflect new return type and functionality.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/Admi.after:
/**
   * Updates the music database: finds new files, removes deleted files, updates modified files.
   *
   * @param path a particular directory or song/file to update
   * @return a positive number identifying the update job. You can read the current job id in the
   *     {@link org.bff.javampd.server.Status} response.
   */
  int updateDatabase(String path);

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/Admi.general_idea: Change return type of updateDatabase(String) from void to int to support job tracking.
Replace getDaemonUpTime() method with new rescan() method.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/Admi.after:
/**
   * Same as {@link #updateDatabase()}, but also rescans unmodified files.
   *
   * @return a positive number identifying the update job. You can read the current job id in the
   *     {@link org.bff.javampd.server.Status} response.
   */
  int rescan();
